creator: stephen@cauchy.math.missouri.edu
text:
mozilla dies with segmentation fault at the web page 
http://www.math.missouri.edu/~stephen/preprints/
and freezes with the web page
http://www.math.missouri.edu/~stephen/junk/
mozilla-0.9.1 did display the pages, but failed to display the symbol fonts properly.

These are not strange web pages - the only unusual thing about them is that they
contain <font face=symbol>.

I asked on a mozilla newsgroup, and apparently the linux version displays these
pages properly.

Fix: 

No idea.  I tried looking at the code, but I'm not sure where the symbol face 
gets processed.
How-To-Repeat: Load http://www.math.missouri.edu/~stephen/preprints/ under mozilla-0.9.2_1.
